# GKBehavior

**Class**

A set of goals that together influence the movement of an agent.

## Declaration

```swift
class GKBehavior
```

## Overview

By combining multiple goals ([doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKGoal] objects) you can create complex behavior, such as groups of agents  ([doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKAgent] objects) that move together naturally. To assign a set of goals to an agent, use its [doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKAgent/behavior] property.

To learn more about using goals and agents, see [https://developer.apple.com/library/archive/documentation/General/Conceptual/GameplayKit_Guide/Agent.html#//apple_ref/doc/uid/TP40015172-CH8] in [https://developer.apple.com/library/archive/documentation/General/Conceptual/GameplayKit_Guide/index.html#//apple_ref/doc/uid/TP40015172].

## Creating a Behavior

- **init(goal:weight:)**: Creates a behavior with a single goal.
- **init(goals:)**: Creates a behavior with the specified goals.
- **init(goals:andWeights:)**: Creates a behavior with the specified goals and weights.
- **init(weightedGoals:)**: Creates a behavior with the specified mapping of goals to their weights.

## Managing a Behavior’s Set of Goals

- **setWeight(_:for:)**: Sets the weight for the specified goal’s influence on agents, adding that goal to the behavior if not already present.
- **weight(for:)**: Returns the weight for the specified goal’s influence on agents.
- **remove(_:)**: Removes the specified goal from the behavior.
- **removeAllGoals()**: Removes all goals from the behavior.
- **goalCount**: The number of goals in the behavior.

## Working with Goals Using Subscript Syntax

- **subscript(_:)**: Returns the weight associated with the goal specified by subscript syntax.
- **subscript(_:)**: Returns the goal at the specified index in the behavior’s list of goals.

## Agents, Goals, and Behaviors

- **GKAgent**: A component that moves a game entity according to a set of goals and realistic constraints.
- **GKAgent2D**: An agent that operates in a two-dimensional space.
- **GKAgent3D**: An agent that operates in a three-dimensional space.
- **GKGoal**: An influence that motivates the movement of one or more agents.
- **GKCompositeBehavior**: A set of behaviors, each of which is a set of goals, that together influence the movement of an agent.
- **GKPath**: A polygonal path that can be followed by an agent.
- **GKAgentDelegate**: Implement this protocol to synchronize the state of an agent with its visual representation in your game.

## Inherits From

- NSObject

## Inherited By

- GKCompositeBehavior

## Conforms To

- CVarArg
- CustomDebugStringConvertible
- CustomStringConvertible
- Equatable
- Hashable
- NSCopying
- NSFastEnumeration
- NSObjectProtocol
